text:
There was once a tiny island completely isolated. It was home to a curious rabbit named Benny. Benny loved exploring the forests. One sunny afternoon, he stumbled upon a shimmering pond.

Every time he dipped his paw into the pond, bubbles escaped. It was magic!

He stayed there all day observing the strange phenomenon. By evening darkness hadn't touched the sky. Benny reflected on his day.

Suddenly, a voice echoed through the forest.

"Benny?"

Startled, he looked up. There stood an old owl named Oliver. Oliver had seen Benny countless times but had never spoken.

"I'm glad you're alone," Oliver said. "You're kind of a legend now."

"How fascinating!" Benny said happily. "I've never heard someone talk."

"The woods whisper my adventures. I've watched you all day. Do you remember that evening?"

Benny felt his heart race. "Of course! Do you?”
